title: Barron's And Bloomberg 2023 Ideal Dividend Stocks Of The Year
text: Two Barron's Annual Roundtable, plus one Bloomberg Intelligence articles published late-January listed 99 intriguing stocks for 2023; 77 were unduplicated US publicly-listed companies, of which, 56 paid-dividends. Barron's two roundtable discussions January 20 and 27 split 49 picks from 9 panelists in half, whereas Bloomberg detailed all 50 in their January 16 BusinessWeek edition.

title: Nippon Life to Commit Further $1 Billion in Resolution Life, Following Strategic Partnership with Blackstone
text: HAMILTON, Bermuda--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Resolution Life today announced that Nippon Life Insurance Company (“Nippon Life”) has agreed to invest an additional commitment of $1 billion in Resolution Life -- a leading global life and annuity insurance consolidation business -- following the recently announced strategic partnership between Resolution Life and Blackstone.

title: Blackstone Strategic Partners Closes Record Private Equity Secondary Funds at $25 Billion
text: NEW YORK--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Blackstone (NYSE:BX) today announced the final close of its latest global secondaries strategy, Strategic Partners IX, and inaugural GP-led continuation fund strategy, Strategic Partners GP Solutions (together with their related committed program vehicles, “SP IX” and “SP GPS” respectively). SP IX has total commitments of $22.2 billion and SP GPS has total commitments of $2.7 billion. SP IX is the world's largest dedicated secondaries fund raised to-date.

title: The 'D' Word
text: U.S. equity markets posted broad-based gains after the closely-watched CPI inflation report showed signs of easing inflationary pressures, strengthening the case for the Fed to slow its pace of rate hikes. Pushing its year-to-date gains to above 4% following a dismal year of performance in 2022, the S&P 500 advanced 2.7% on the week while the tech-heavy Nasdaq 100 rallied 4.5%.
